listing.title: Browser game playtest evidence report
listing.description: Smoke/playtest pass for browser games: boot check, keyboard or pointer input, HUD readability, canvas visibility, responsive layout, severity-ranked findings, and screenshot-based evidence when the target is accessible.

listing.title: Android flow smoke test report
listing.description: Android app flow QA report using adb evidence when available: launch, navigation, UI tree notes, screenshot review, logcat or crash clues, and concise reproduction steps. If adb is missing, I return a setup blocker report.

listing.title: AI output QA hallucination check
listing.description: Verification pass for AI output against supplied sources, requirements, API traces, or repo files. Delivery includes claim-level pass/fail notes, missing evidence, contradiction risks, and a corrected concise answer.
